title: onosma lijiangensis
intro: Onosma lijiangensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as a type of golden ragwort. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Onosma lijiangensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit anticancer properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its aerial parts are used to make herbal teas or tinctures for the treatment of various ailments.
